text: Major bandh called by trade unions — all shops closed in Andheri and Bandra
Road blockade on Western Express Highway — avoid all travel today
Bandh in effect across Mumbai — delivery services suspended citywide
Curfew imposed in parts of Old Delhi due to communal unrest — police deployed
Road closures near Lajpat Nagar and Rohini — protest march blocking NH-24
Heavy rain in Koramangala — roads waterlogged near forum mall
BTM Layout flooded — avoid 100 Feet Road completely
Flooding reported in Velachery underpass — avoid the area
Light showers expected in Kothrud today — carry umbrellas
Normal conditions in Banjara Hills — restaurants open as usual
